channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: openrocket /openrocket | Java | N/A
item.description: Model-rocketry aerodynamics and trajectory simulation software

item.title: TauricResearch /TradingAgents | Python | N/A
item.description: TradingAgents: Multi-Agents LLM Financial Trading Framework

item.title: vas3k /TaxHacker | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Self-hosted AI accounting app. LLM analyzer for receipts, invoices, transactions with custom prompts and categories

item.title: newton-physics /newton | Python | N/A
item.description: An open-source, GPU-accelerated physics simulation engine built upon NVIDIA Warp, specifically targeting roboticists and simulation researchers.

item.title: louis-e /arnis | Rust | N/A
item.description: Generate any location from the real world in Minecraft with a high level of detail.

item.title: opendataloader-project /opendataloader-pdf | Java | N/A
item.description: PDF Parser for AI-ready data. Automate PDF accessibility. Open-source.

item.title: obra /superpowers | Shell | N/A
item.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

item.title: jarrodwatts /claude-hud | JavaScript | N/A
item.description: A Claude Code plugin that shows what's happening - context usage, active tools, running agents, and todo progress
